info.name: Bulk download information for all facilities

items.docs: Retrieve all available facilities in a single operation, formatted as either a GeoJSON FeatureCollection or as a CSV. Due to the complexity of the facility resource type, the CSV response contains a subset of available facility data - specifically it omits the available services, patient satisfaction, and patient wait time data.

info.name: Query facilities by location or IDs, with optional filters

params.name: ids
params.description: List of comma-separated facility IDs to retrieve in a single request. Can be combined with lat and long parameters to retrieve facilities sorted by distance from a location.

params.name: zip
params.description: Zip code to search for facilities. More detailed zip codes can be passed in, but only the first five digits are used to determine facilities to return.

params.name: state
params.description: State in which to search for facilities. Except in rare cases, this is two characters.

params.name: lat
params.description: Latitude of point to search for facilities, in WGS84 coordinate reference system.

params.name: long
params.description: Longitude of point to search for facilities, in WGS84 coordinate reference system.

params.name: radius
params.description: Optional radial distance from specified latitude and longitude to filter facilities search in WGS84 coordinate reference system.

params.name: bbox[]
params.description: Bounding box (longitude, latitude, longitude, latitude) within which facilities will be returned. (WGS84 coordinate reference system)

params.name: visn
params.description: VISN search of matching facilities.

params.name: type
params.description: Optional facility type search filter

params.name: services[]
params.description: Optional facility service search filter

params.name: mobile
params.description: Optional facility mobile search filter

params.name: page
params.description: Page of results to return per paginated response.

params.name: per_page
params.description: Number of results to return per paginated response.

items.docs:
Query facilities by bounding box, latitude and longitude, state, visn, or zip code. Bounding box is specified as four `bbox[]` parameters, long1, lat1, long2, lat2. (Relative order is unimportant.)

A query by latitude and longitude returns all facilities in the system, sorted by distance from that location. Providing an optional radius in miles to this query will narrow the scope of the returned facilities to those falling within the specified radius from that location.

info.name: Retrieve a specific facility by ID

params.name: id
params.description: Facility ID, in the form `<prefix>_<station>`, where prefix is one of "vha", "vba", "nca", or "vc", for health facility, benefits, cemetery, or vet center, respectively.

items.docs: Retrieve a specific facility by ID

info.name: Bulk download of all facility IDs

params.name: type
params.description: Optional facility type search filter

items.docs: Retrieves all available facility IDs only

info.name: Retrieve all VA health facilities reachable by driving within the specified time period

params.name: lat
params.description: Latitude of the location from which drive time will be calculated.

params.name: lng
params.description: Longitude of the location from which drive time will be calculated.

params.name: street_address
params.description: Street address of the location from which drive time will be calculated.

params.name: city
params.description: City of the location from which drive time will be calculated.

params.name: state
params.description: Two character state code of the location from which drive time will be calculated.

params.name: zip
params.description: Zip code of the location from which drive time will be calculated.

params.name: drive_time
params.description: Filter to only include facilities that are within the specified number of drive time minutes from the requested location.

params.name: services[]
params.description: Optional facility service search filter

items.docs:
Retrieve all VA health facilities that are located within a specified drive time from a specified location based on coordinates (lat and lng). Optional filter parameters include drive_time and services[]. Address (street_address, city, state, and zip) no longer returns results.

The "attributes" element has information about the drive-time band that contains the requested location for each facility in the response. The values of `min_time` and `max_time` are in minutes. For example, a facility r
